lede: A look at April 23 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Prince Louis of Wales and Sven Kramer, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2018 Toronto van attack
events.desc: A vehicle-ramming attack kills 11 people and injures 15 in Toronto. A 25-year-old suspect, Alek Minassian, is arrested.

events.title: Death of Blair Peach
events.desc: Blair Peach, a British activist, is fatally injured after being knocked unconscious during an Anti-Nazi League demonstration against a National Front election meeting in Southall, London.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Greek government and King George II evacuate Athens before the invading Wehrmacht.

events.title: Cardiff City F.C.
events.desc: Cardiff City defeat Arsenal in the FA Cup Final, the only time it has been won by a team not based in England.

events.title: Grand National Assembly of Turkey
events.desc: The Grand National Assembly of Turkey (TBMM) is founded in Ankara. The assembly denounces the government of Sultan Mehmed VI and announces the preparation of a temporary constitution.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The British Royal Navy makes a raid in an attempt to neutralise the Belgian port of Bruges-Zeebrugge.

events.title: Chilean Civil War of 1891
events.desc: Chilean Civil War: The ironclad Blanco Encalada is sunk at Caldera Bay by torpedo boats.

events.title: Johann Sebastian Bach
events.desc: Johann Sebastian Bach leads the first performance of his cantata Du Hirte Israel, höre, BWV 104, illustrating the topic of the Good Shepherd in pastoral music.

events.title: Charles II of England
events.desc: King Charles II of England, Scotland and Ireland is crowned in Westminster Abbey.

events.title: Edmund Ironside
events.desc: Edmund Ironside succeeds his father Æthelred the Unready as King of England.

births.name: Bernadette Devlin McAliskey
births.line: Irish civil rights leader and politician

births.name: Fritz Wotruba
births.line: Austrian sculptor, designed the Wotruba Church (died 1975)

births.name: Winthrop M. Crane
births.line: American businessman and politician, 40th Governor of Massachusetts (died 1920)

deaths.text: Boris Yeltsin, Russian politician, 1st President of Russia
Satyajit Ray, Indian director, producer, and screenwriter
Aubrey de Vere, 10th Earl of Oxford, English politician and nobleman (born c. 1338)

observances.text: Christian feast day: Felix, Fortunatus, and Achilleus
Christian feast day: Blessed Giles of Assisi
Christian feast day: Blessed Maria Gabriella Sagheddu
Christian feast day: Toyohiko Kagawa (Episcopal and Lutheran Church)
